_comment: Step-grid for grid_to_midi.py, matched bar-for-bar to song.abc (20 bars, M:7/8, one step = one eighth note, matching the 2+2+3 grouping). FIXED (was previously worked around): grid_to_midi.py used to hardcode beats_per_bar=4 internally, so tempo_bpm had to be fudged to 91.428571 to compensate. The script now reads beats_per_bar from this spec, so tempo_bpm is the real musical tempo (Q:1/8=160 = 80 quarter-note BPM) and beats_per_bar is set explicitly to 3.5 (7 eighths = 7*4/8 quarter-note-equivalents). steps_per_bar=7 (one step per eighth note) and swing=0.5 (straight/unswung, so the script's off-beat swing push -- built for a 16-step 8th/16th grid -- has zero effect, since it does not meaningfully apply to a 7-step-per-bar odd-meter grid).
title: Riptide - drums

sections.label: Intro (bars 1-2): restless/unsettled, near-silent -- only a soft rimshot marks the downbeat
A1-main (bars 3-5): soft groove enters -- kick + hats on the 2+2+3 group downbeats
A1-fill (bar 6): pickup snare hit on the last eighth, leading into A2
A2-main (bars 7-9): building -- kick fills all 3 group downbeats, snare backbeat on the 3-group, hats tighten to every eighth
A2-fill (bar 10): a breath pulling back before section B, matching the melody/bass 'reach and rest' gesture
B-build (bars 11-13): the hardest pre-climax push -- kick on every group downbeat, syncopated snare pushes off the downbeats, hats driving
B-silence (bar 14): total drum silence -- the subtraction breath right before the climax hits (only the bass pedal from the ABC sounds here)
C-climax (bars 15-18): full tutti -- kick+snare hit together on the ensemble's downbeat/3-group landing points, hats and ride both driving ('ride opens it up')
Outro-tag (bar 19): a confident tag hit, still moving
Final (bar 20): one clean stinger on the final held chord, then silence -- no fade
